name: Dr Alexej Ulbricht
title: Senior Lecturer in Political Theory
department: Department of Politics and International Studies
expertise_topics: Alexej's work focuses on exclusions within liberalism and how liberal discourses provide conceptual resources for illiberal groups to mobilise within civil society. He has explored this in a number of areas including the backlash against liberal multiculturalism
and anti-abortion activism. He is currently working on two projects: one on discourses within liberal democracies mobilising against effective climate-action
and one on notions of fairness and justice in the EU's Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive
research_interests: Alexej's work focuses on exclusions within liberalism and how liberal discourses provide conceptual resources for illiberal groups to mobilise within civil society. He has explored this in a number of areas including the backlash against liberal multiculturalism, homo-nationalist media-narratives, and anti-abortion activism. He is currently working on two projects: one on discourses within liberal democracies mobilising against effective climate-action, and one on notions of fairness and justice in the EU's Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive.
